competitor_changes: Multi-currency invoicing with 80+ currencies including EUR, GBP, USD native
Real-time bank feeds (Barclays, HSBC via Open Banking API)
current_tool_status: Reconciliation on datasets >5,000 rows now takes 4–8 minutes (improved but still causes month-end bottleneck)
Revenue recognition module still not IFRS 15 compliant — workaround in use
compliance_changes: Added GDPR Data Processing Agreement but data stored on US servers — non-compliant with Meridian's UK GDPR obligations for EU client data
notes: Competitor's EU data residency roadmap still pending self-serve option
